primary_flags.summary: Visit refusal cascade relay — Olivia positioned as proxy in gatekeeping dispute. Context: Eli's scheduled Labor Day weekend; Olivia refused to attend. Melissa relays Olivia's position in escalating stages: ROW-8127 (Aug 24): 'Olivia said she wants to stay home with me Labor Day weekend because she knows we normally go and do fun things' — initial relay framing Olivia's preference as information. ROW-8131-8132 (Aug 27): 'I tried talking to her and she is very adamant that she's not going. I told her I would ask about switching and I did / So you need to talk to her before Friday so that she understands she needs to go.' Melissa relays Olivia's refusal while also directing Eli to convince Olivia himself — positioning Olivia as the decision-maker in a court-ordered parenting schedule dispute. Cross-reference RF-01 ADD-004 (RF01-B028-F001). Cross-reference RF-02 ARC-RF02-006 (visit refusal cascade / relocation context).
exact_quotes: ROW-8127 (Received): 'Olivia said she wants to stay home with me Labor Day weekend because she knows we normally go and do fun things'
ROW-8131 (Received): 'I tried talking to her and she is very adamant that she\'s not going. I told her I would ask about switching and I did'
ROW-8132 (Received): 'So you need to talk to her before Friday so that she understands she needs to go'
primary_flags.rf08_mechanism: Visit refusal relay: Olivia's stated preference relayed to justify non-compliance with court-ordered parenting schedule. Olivia positioned as the decision-maker (Eli must 'convince' her to comply with the parenting plan). Combines relay mechanism with gatekeeping.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF08-001 ACTIVE: 9 signals. Phase B/C transition batch. S009 introduces the visit-refusal-relay sub-pattern — Olivia used as proxy to justify gatekeeping. Continues through B-029+ (Nov 2025 visit refusals).

compound_patterns.description: Visit refusal cascade relay: RF-08 (Olivia positioned as decision-maker and proxy in gatekeeping dispute), RF-01 ADD-004 (child relay in parental alienation context), RF-02 (gatekeeping through child-preference framing — Olivia's stated preference used to justify non-compliance with court-ordered parenting plan). Triple compound.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Phase B/C. Aug-Oct 2025. S009 begins the visit-refusal-relay pattern that escalates through Phase C.
batch_observations.rf08_assessment: One Sev-2 primary flag. The visit refusal cascade uses the relay mechanism in a gatekeeping context: Olivia's stated preference is the justification for non-compliance with the parenting plan, and Eli is redirected to 'convince' Olivia — positioning the child as the authority over court-ordered access.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: Triple compound (RF-08 + RF-01 + RF-02). The visit refusal cascade is the Phase C dominant pattern; RF-08 contributes the triangulation mechanism by which Olivia's stated preferences are used to frame the refusal as child-driven rather than parent-facilitated.
